description_long: This is a compact, enclosed utility trailer with a geometric, faceted exterior featuring alternating black and white horizontal stripes. The trailer is mounted on a single axle with two wheels and has a triangular metal frame at the front for hitching to a vehicle. One side displays a large, light gray panel with two teal ventilation grilles, while the opposite side features prominent branding and text. The rear of the trailer has a single yellow door with a bone-shaped cutout, suggesting a pet-related function, and the words 'BANHO E TOSA A DOMICILIO' are visible below. The roof is flat with a striped pattern, and the overall build appears to be metal with some plastic or composite elements. The trailer is designed for urban mobility and likely serves as a mobile pet grooming unit.
description: A compact, striped utility trailer with a yellow rear door, teal side vents, and pet grooming signage, mounted on a single axle with a front hitch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the faceted, striped face and the triangular metal hitch frame.
description_view_1: Side view with a large gray panel and two teal ventilation grilles, plus a single wheel and the hitch extending forward.
description_view_2: Rear view with a yellow door featuring a bone cutout and pet grooming signage at the bottom.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with prominent 'DOCELAR' branding and additional text, plus a single wheel and the hitch visible.
attribute_branding_or_signage: branding with 'DOCELAR' and pet grooming service text on side, yellow bone symbol on rear door
